title: The Potential and Challenges of GPS Mobility Data for Epidemic Modeling

dataset_schema.label: GPS Mobility Data
dataset_schema.description: Latitude, longitude, timestamps, device ID, dwell time, inferred home location, visit frequency.

dataset_schema.label: Demographic Metadata
dataset_schema.description: Census block group attributes (income, race, education).

original_intent.label: GPS Data
original_intent.description: Advertising, retail analytics, and consumer behaviour tracking.

repurposed_use: Used for COVID-19 modelling, estimating transmission networks, evaluating lockdown policies, and urban mobility analysis.

limitations.label: Selection Bias
limitations.description: Under-representation of low-income and low-smartphone populations.

limitations.label: Granularity
limitations.description: Aggregation to census level removes within-area variation.

transformations.label: Reweighting
transformations.description: Adjust sample to match population demographics.

notes: Demonstrates how commercial data repurposing introduces structural inequities in public health modelling.
